summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Project Financial Summary (Récapitulatif financier) feature. All 9 backend API tests passed. Frontend UI verified for both admin and public client views with all components working correctly.

issues: 'Reste à payer' and 'Reste à facturer' cards don't show in the text check - likely due to French special characters or card structure. Visual inspection confirms they are present.

seed_data_creation: Used existing test data: Quote DEV-2026-0004 with 4 situations
context_for_next_testing_agent: Financial summary feature fully tested. Quote DEV-2026-0004 (ID: 71a8cca3-dd2a-4e2d-9dc0-d72622b3b1a1) has 4 situations at 100% progress with total 2400€ TTC. Share token: _wR86pskq_gMUy_sM00Xuw1garuGVs3bxdoJvGkOIrA. Public endpoint works without authentication.

tests: ✓ GET /api/quotes/{id}/financial-summary - returns complete summary
✓ Response includes: quote_id, quote_number, client_name, status
✓ Response includes: project_total_ht, project_total_vat, project_total_ttc
✓ Response includes: acomptes section (count, total_invoiced, total_paid, pending)
✓ Response includes: situations section (count, total_invoiced, total_paid, pending, progress_percentage)
✓ Response includes: retenue_garantie section (total_retained, total_released, pending_release)
✓ Response includes: totals section (total_invoiced, total_paid, remaining_to_invoice, remaining_to_pay, percentage_paid)
✓ Response includes: invoices list with id, invoice_number, type, date, total_ttc, payment_status
✓ Calculations correct: total_invoiced = acomptes + situations
✓ 404 returned for non-existent quote
✓ 401/403 returned without authentication
✓ GET /api/public/quote/{token}/financial-summary - returns summary without auth
✓ Same data structure as authenticated endpoint
✓ Data matches authenticated endpoint for same quote
✓ 404 returned for invalid share token
✓ 'Récapitulatif financier' button visible in header (with BarChart3 icon)
✓ Button toggles financial summary section visibility
✓ Button text changes to 'Masquer récapitulatif' when summary is shown
✓ Button only visible when quote status is not 'brouillon'
✓ Header card with project info (quote number, client name, total TTC)
✓ Progress bar showing 'Progression des paiements' with percentage
✓ 4 summary cards: Facturé, Encaissé, Reste à payer, Reste à facturer
✓ Acomptes section with count badge and breakdown
✓ Situations section with progress bar and breakdown
✓ Retenue de garantie section with breakdown
✓ Historique des factures with clickable invoice links
✓ Invoice links navigate to invoice detail page
✓ Two tabs: 'Devis' and 'Récapitulatif projet'
✓ 'Récapitulatif projet' tab shows financial summary
✓ Same layout as admin view
✓ Invoice numbers displayed but NOT clickable (read-only mode)
✓ No authentication required
✓ Total invoiced = Acomptes total + Situations total
✓ Remaining to invoice = Project total - Total invoiced
✓ Remaining to pay = Total invoiced - Total paid + Retenue pending
✓ Percentage paid = (Total paid / Project total) * 100

mocked_apis_list: Email sending (Resend API - test key re_123_test)
